text.title: Information Architecture (Designer Surface) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Information Architecture (Designer Surface).

example.scenario: A solo founder applies information architecture (designer surface) on a live feature: prerequisites collected, draft produced from the template, evidence attached per claim, the validator script passes with exit 0, owner signs off, and the artefact is committed alongside the feature branch.
